creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Jun 20, 2007 at 02:50:07AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>  Hello Dmitry,
>  
>  We're close to getting a maintainer timeout on this PR again, and
>  I would like you not to get angry again because of this.
>  
>  I didn't get your first email, I didn't get a reply to my reply to
>  you. Nothing is noted in GNATS.
>  
>  On saturday morning, if a maintainer timeout occurs, I'll be setting
>  this one again to repocopy and assign it to portmgr for it.
>  
>  Just a heads up.
>  
>  Edwin
>  

Yes, you are right.  Sorry for the delay.  I was busy at work.

I still feel uncomfortable with databases category, despite NetBSD
and Fedora Core went this way.  And i still think that most users of
rrdtool assosiate is with network management, and would first search for it
in net-mgmt category.

If you have strong desire to move it to databases, please do. Also 
change MAINTAINER to either ports@ or someone else.

Thanks for your work.
